item.title: Fuck cancer
item.description:
You were always more beautiful than me
You loved dirty comics and humor. Drinking wine and telling horrible jokes were like second nature to you
You loved life and fought so fucking hard for it
After the cancer spread you fought even harder
I don't know what's going to happen now without you . How will I ever begin to tell your niece about you. How will I ever stop crying. I wasn't even there to say goodbye. Bye little sister. Rest easy now and I'm so sorry
item.dc:creator: kimmycat57

item.title: My first attempt at jumping
item.description: Two years ago I was in a car accident and acquired a brain injury. They told me I probably wouldn't walk again. This is my first attempt at jumping! #disability #inspirational #awesome
item.dc:creator: duffieldious018

item.title: Saturday MEME Phone Clearing Dump (#420)
item.description:
1. It do be like that
2. Me who just wanted some cake
3. Still one of the best pre-fight exchanges
4. Mugshots used to be way more descriptive...
5. Civil War II when?
6. Women be like
7. You're god damn right, lady
8. *sigh* "We're not so different, you and I
9. JUST SHUT UP, BRO
10. Escape attempt foiled again!
11
12. Shotgun yer beer they said....
13. Awwww, so romantic
14. HOLD UP BUDDY, You've been scrolling for too long so I gotta slap you with a puppy tax "Give up, Barkanin! I have the higher ground!"
15. Thank you for making it to the end of this dump, I hope you were thoroughly entertained! I would like to share with you that I'm making a wacky game called Do Not Press The Button, and it's humor and style are kind of inspired by the Stanley Parable. I'm working on tons of fun stuff to do in it! For example: JOINING THE CHAIR REVOLUTION (yes there is a whole storyline where you help the chairs against the oppression of the evil tables! If you liked the humor in this dump, you would probably like the game. Please wishlist: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ Thank you for supporting indie devs!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: 100 kg down in a year!
item.description: Just checking this one off the list, I lost 100 kg (220 lb) in the last year, and I've been looking forward to posting the progress pictures here so here they are! Video of the year if you're interested https://youtu.be/hcmIrI9AQuQ
item.dc:creator: JeanLucguizamos

item.title: Eva Longoria Has Made Over $12 Million Off ‘John Wick’ and Still Gets Checks 10 Years After Her $6 Million Saved the Movie: ‘My Only Mistake’ Was Not Doing the Sequels
item.description: Eva Longoria is still getting checks over 10 years later from her $6 million investment in 2014’s “John Wick,” It was revealed earlier this month that Longoria quietly stepped in to close the movie’s $6 million financing gap less than 24 hours before production would’ve shut down entirely. Essentially, there’d be no “John Wick” franchise without Longoria’s contribution that saved the original film. “That is accurate. By the way, I was in my infancy,” Longoria said while talking about her “John Wick” investment for the first time. “My bankroll was very new, and it was a lot of money, and I was like, ‘So how does it work?’ I had no idea. I would love to say I was an investment genius and I just knew and I calculated my risk. No, none of that. I was like, ‘What do you mean gap financing?’ But something that I’ve learned, looking back, I love investing in people. You can tell me you’re opening a chicken farm, but if you’re fucking passionate about it and you’ve done the work and know the market, I mean, [directors Chad Stahelski and David Leitch] did their work. They put in their 10,000 hours as stunt guys and second unit directors; they had seen all the bad movies and knew how to make a good one. It was that. They were undeniably passionate and I knew they were going to make an undeniable product.” When asked if she’s still getting checks from her “John Wick” investment, Longoria answered: “Yes. What I’m pissed off about is I wasn’t connected to the rest of them. This was a one-time thing. That was the gamble. But that was my only mistake, not being attached to all of the films.” The success of 2014’s “John Wick” spawned a franchise that has since grossed $1 billion across four movies. While Longoria was not involved with any of the sequels, the franchise’s enduring popularity keeps the 2014 original in constant viewing rotation so the checks continue to come in for her. So how much as she made? “You know, I would have to check. More than double [$6 million], for sure,” Longoria answered. As the secret hero behind the “John Wick” franchise, Longoria said it’s always fun to run into the film’s directors or star Keanu Reeves around Hollywood. “[Keanu and I] ran into each other because of his girlfriend, Alexandra. We know her through some friends, and we met her and Keanu at an art event,” Longoria recalled. “Keanu said, ‘I’d love to take you to dinner; we should celebrate 10 years.’ So we toasted to ‘John Wick.'” https://variety.com/2024/film/news/eva-longoria-john-wick-checks-1236196504/
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin

item.title: Railway station transformed into metro station
item.description: Source: https://youtube.com/shorts/k9NJs-w95NU?si=ctGeC3KWlj-hF06d In just 3.5 hours, 1,200 workers in Japan completely transformed a train station into a metro station. Starting at 1 a.m., the goal was to overhaul Daikanyama Station, one of Tokyo's busiest, without disrupting regular train service. Rails were moved, signaling systems changed, and the entire station was redesigned—all before the first 5 a.m. train resumed its route. This project showcases how top-level engineering can achieve incredible feats in an unbelievably short time frame.
item.dc:creator: skibbyAU

item.title: Rock of the Three Whales
item.description: The Rock of the Three Whales, or "Hin Sam Wan" in Thai, is a unique geological formation located in Bueng Kan Province in northeastern Thailand. The formation is named for its resemblance to three whales swimming together and is a popular tourist attraction due to its scenic beauty and panoramic views. Here's more about it: 1. Formation and Appearance: The Rock of the Three Whales is a massive rock structure on a mountain ridge. The formation consists of three large rocks aligned in a row, resembling a family of whales — a parent, a child, and a baby whale. These "whales" appear to be swimming in the lush green forest below, offering a surreal view, especially from above or from a distance. 2. Hiking and Access: Reaching the Rock of the Three Whales requires a moderate hike through Phu Singh Forest Park. This path allows visitors to explore the natural surroundings, which include dense forests, waterfalls, and other interesting rock formations. The hike itself is scenic and often accompanied by local guides who can share information about the area's history and ecology. 3. Scenic Views: Once at the top, visitors are rewarded with spectacular views stretching across the Mekong River and into Laos. The formation offers a stunning vantage point, particularly at sunrise and sunset, when the rocks glow in different shades of orange, red, and pink. 4. Cultural Significance: The Rock of the Three Whales is not only a natural wonder but also holds cultural significance for the local Thai people. It is considered a sacred site, and visitors are encouraged to respect the area and preserve its natural beauty. 5. Best Time to Visit: The best time to visit is during the dry season, from November to February, when the weather is cooler and the skies are clear, enhancing visibility for panoramic views. The Rock of the Three Whales is an incredible spot for nature enthusiasts, photographers, and those interested in unique geological formations, offering a peaceful escape into one of Thailand's lesser-known natural treasures.
item.dc:creator: heyrisul

15. A very Judgmental Washing Machine! P.S. When not posting on Imgur, I work on a passion project of mine, called Do Not Press The Button. It's kind of inspired by the Stanley Parable and if you like the game and the humor in this dump, I think it's for you. Please help out with a wishlist, even if you don't planing on buying it on launch. Right now I just need to build my wishlist numbers, so Steam will show it to more players: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Dont_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse_The_Game/

item.title: The whiplash can be funny to see
item.description: I also use it as a soft-boiled litmus test to judge people based on character. If they're quick to denounce me and accuse me of being a welfare queen, I know they aren't worth keeping around as friends.
